title: condition fixed for adding volume to boltdb.
body:
In case of empty `ctr.runtime.config.VolumePath`, NamedVolume were manipulated.
more details of issued discussed at https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1757#issuecomment-446129509

Signed-off-by: Kunal Kushwaha <kushwaha_kunal_v7@lab.ntt.co.jp>

comments.body: @mheon PTAL, all tests passes in my local environment.
